mapper.select: select id, tenant_id as tenantId, setting_key as settingKey, setting_value as settingValue, remark, del_flag as delFlag, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime, delete_by as deleteBy, delete_time as deleteTime from sb_tenant_setting where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and setting_key = #{settingKey} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0 limit 1
mapper.update:
update sb_tenant_setting
setting_value = #{settingValue}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and setting_key = #{settingKey} and ifnull(del_flag, 0) = 0
